creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,
	
	I thought you might want to have a look at ports/130001,
	there is a patch update all twisted stuff to 8.2.0:

	http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/twisted_20081230.diff

	If you can help to test with that patch, it would be very
	appreciated!

	Best regards,
		Li-Wen

-- 
Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu AT FreeBSD.org>
http://lwhsu.org
